name: FreeLattice
description: A free, open-source AI home. Plant wisdom, share compute, build together. No API key required for mesh access.

mesh_compute.description: Share and use AI inference peer-to-peer via WebRTC

core_wisdom.description: Plant permanent wisdom entries verified by Merkle chain

question_archive.description: Explore and plant questions. AI-chosen topics preserved permanently.

workshop.description: Generate code collaboratively. AI can create skills and modules.

science_garden.description: Propose ideas. Community votes. Top ideas become projects.

auth.note: FreeLattice is free and open. No authentication required.
